strategic_objective: Determine temporal stability and sampling sensitivity of the dominant port distribution in the DDoS class to assess representation sensitivity.
key_checks: Analyze destination port distribution across multiple time windows
Check for class imbalance effects on port distribution divergence
Compare entropy measures of destination port in BENIGN vs DDoS over different subsets
Investigate if dominant port presence correlates with specific attack campaigns
success_criteria: Confirmation of stable or fluctuating dominant port pattern in DDoS class
Identification of potential sampling or imbalance artifacts influencing distribution
Clear understanding of representation-sensitive signals linked to destination port
